content: agent1: implementing normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (refactoring image_to_base64). Will touch that file's image-related methods only.

agent1: I've landed normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) in types.py (module-level fn before ImageBlock, ~line 52). image_to_base64 now does: self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then guesses mimetype from decoded_for_guessing if not set. I don't see get_image_mimetype in the file currently - if you add it, please have it accept the decoded_for_guessing bytes (or call normalize_image_bytes itself) rather than re-deriving base64 detection, and have image_to_base64 call both normalize_image_bytes + your accessor. Let me know before you overwrite so we don't clobber - happy for you to land second and merge on top of my diff.
